# Dumpster Daddies Junk Removal

> Family-owned same-day junk removal, large cleanouts, demolition, and dumpster rentals based in Leander, TX, serving a 20-mile radius across Central Texas. 5.0 stars on 104 Google reviews. Open 7am–8pm, 7 days a week.

## Business
- Name: Dumpster Daddies Junk Removal
- Owner: Gage Taylor
- Phone: (512) 677-2803 (tel:+15126772803)
- Hours: 7am–8pm, 7 days a week (including weekends and holidays)
- Headquarters: Leander, TX (Central Texas)
- Service radius: 20 miles around Leander
- Rating: 5.0 / 5 on 104 verified Google reviews
- Discounts: Military, First Responder, Holiday
- Price range: $$
- Pricing model: Flat-rate, upfront — no hidden fees

- Commercial Cleanouts (offices, retail, warehouses) — /services/commercial-cleanouts
- Light Demolition (sheds, decks, fences, barns, hot tubs — nothing with water/power active) — /services/demolition
- Furniture Removal — /services/furniture-removal
- Dumpster Rentals — 17-yard dumpsters starting at $449, flat-rate, no hidden fees, same-day delivery available — /services/dumpster-rentals

## Service Area
Primary towns (dedicated pages):
Leander, Cedar Park, Liberty Hill, Georgetown, Round Rock, Jonestown, Lago Vista, Brushy Creek, Anderson Mill, Volente, Point Venture, Lakeway, Bee Cave, Pflugerville, Hutto, Austin (N/NW).

Also serving (within 20 miles):
Jollyville, Hudson Bend, Bertram, Florence, Andice, Spicewood, Serenada, Weir.

## Guarantees
- On-Time Guarantee (10% off if late; we text 15 minutes before arrival)
- No Surprise Pricing (flat-rate, upfront)
- Property Protection Promise
- Broom-Clean Guarantee
- Satisfaction Guarantee
- Responsible Disposal (donate, recycle, dispose — landfill last)
